details.test: Task 1: Save up to 3 senior software engineer jobs in San Francisco
Task 2: Compare two jobs and add note to one with more vacation days
Task 3: Create weekly job alert for remote data analyst roles in US
Task 4: Submit quick application for a job that allows quick apply
Task 5: Shortlist the highest-paying job by annual salary in San Francisco
Task 6: Add up to 3 jobs to compare set from search results
Task 7: Save closest job in San Francisco using distance sort (parking adapted)
Task 8: Email job with earliest application deadline to a friend
Task 9: Save two newest high-paying remote jobs after removing industry filter
